channel.title: KPR's Morning Edition
channel.description: Daily strategic macro-level news analysis delivered through a progressive grey-swan mitigation framework. Automated intelligence summaries designed to identify systemic blindspots and high-impact global trends before they happen.
channel.itunes:author: Kareem Shaw

item.title: Grey Swan Briefing - Initial Setup
item.description: Automated strategic summary briefing initializing the distribution pipeline.
item.itunes:author: Kareem Shaw
